creator: jfc@mit.edu
text: Is the code using the wrong target, soft floating point (armv7-freebsd) instead of hardware FP (armv7-freebsd-gnueabihf)?  See, for example, bug 272806 and https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-arm/2023-August/002933.html and replies.  FreeBSD-CURRENT no longer supports ARM versions older than armv7.
